long_description:
The cosaction delete command should be executed from the deployer, and snapshot labelling should be done from the jumpod.

sets of commands to 
1. delete the coalescevolume spec
2. patch the snapshot to remove the coalesce volume id from the status
3.label the snapshot

- 39e8ac3f9ced4b14a543b42c2d7c6dc8
    1. r018-427463ba-7d22-440e-9a21-8c64b3b26656 mzone7a7
      kubectl delete volumespec -n 0b0d7b643c374610b4b4258cb66e4d7c -l "ExternalVolumeID=r018-edf448e9-411c-41cc-bcb0-73c91a169f22"
      kubectl patch storagesnapshot -n 39e8ac3f9ced4b14a543b42c2d7c6dc8 r018-a5cf7060-f866-4594-af17-e6098ab92ca4 --type json --patch '[{"op":"replace","path":"/status/coalesceVolumeId","value":""}]'
      kubectl label snap -n 39e8ac3f9ced4b14a543b42c2d7c6dc8 r018-427463ba-7d22-440e-9a21-8c64b3b26656 "foo1=bar1"

  2. r018-7fd107ed-46ad-4cdb-9fa3-6adec2a0a245 mzone7a7
      kubectl delete volumespec -n 0b0d7b643c374610b4b4258cb66e4d7c -l "ExternalVolumeID=r018-a7f299ea-107f-4110-b25e-e887953d63be"
      kubectl patch storagesnapshot -n 39e8ac3f9ced4b14a543b42c2d7c6dc8 r018-bf4b6eb3-30be-484b-9e41-886d3f80d5ea --type json --patch '[{"op":"replace","path":"/status/coalesceVolumeId","value":""}]'
      kubectl label snap -n 39e8ac3f9ced4b14a543b42c2d7c6dc8 r018-7fd107ed-46ad-4cdb-9fa3-6adec2a0a245 "foo1=bar1"
Incident source: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/SNAP-6095 - VARSHINI J M

current_status_next_steps:
This incident is to cleanup snapshots stuck in deleting, so no recovery steps are needed.  If it's successful then snapshots are cleaned up else no change in status quo

In the given runbook link follow step 6 and 7

 -- runbook link -- 
https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/snapshot_stuck_deleting.html#troubleshooting-steps
